subject: A heavy stone or metal cube hovering above a rocky surface, crackling with arcs of pale lightning that radiate outward into a dim, smoky cavern.
description: A blocky, cube-shaped device — part stone, part forged metal, banded with dark iron plates — floats just above a craggy ground. Bright white-blue lightning arcs erupt from its top and sides, branching into the surrounding gloom. The environment reads as a subterranean chamber or dungeon: jagged rock formations frame the lower half of the image, and a haze of smoke or mist softens the dim background. The palette is muted greys, ash, and washed-out browns broken by the sharp electric white of the discharging energy. There are no visible figures; the machine itself is the subject, ominous and inert despite the violent energy it emits.
foreground: stone-and-iron cube device discharging lightning, set on a rocky outcrop
background: dim cavern interior with jagged rocks and smoky haze
